title: Memory parameter should be specified for Scikit-learn Pipeline
description: Ensures that memory limits are explicitly set for Scikit-learn pipelines.
message: Memory limit is not specified for the Scikit-learn pipeline.
recommendation: Set a memory limit for the Scikit-learn pipeline.
why_is_this_an_issue: Scikit-learn pipelines can consume large amounts of memory, and failing to set a memory limit can lead to out-of-memory errors or unstable performance.
how_to_fix: Set a memory limit for the pipeline when creating it.

metadata.title: Memory parameter should be specified for Scikit-learn Pipeline
